title: Steady Steps
detail_text: <:th_ch0004/>Eli, I’d like to talk to you about the next song’s choreography....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>Choreography? Was there any part that’s hard to understand?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0004/>No, I just want you to confirm if I can do it properly or not<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>Properly, huh.... Aren’t yours always perfect, Umi<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0004/>I have confidence in my ability to remember the choreography, but.... When I saw the last live’s video, I thought I can’t keep going on like this<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>I see. So, in other words, you’re bothered by the progress of the other girls?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0004/>! That’s right! Rin has started to get the fine movements right, Kotori’s expressions have also softened during her performance. Maki and Hanayo have also steadily improved....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>From my perspective, I think you’ve also improved enough, Umi. You’re no longer shy about doing poses anymore, and above all, you’re having fun<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0004/>Eeh!? I-, is that so....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>Of course! But it’s wonderful to have a desire to keep improving yourself. I’ll take a look at parts that have been bothering you. But in return, you’ll have to accompany me with practice, okay<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
